allow: Bash(cat .gitignore && echo "---" && ls -la ~/dev/ 2>/dev/null | head -30 && echo "---PLANE---" && find / -maxdepth 6 -type d -name "plane*" 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "plane" | head -20)
Bash(cat ~/plane-dev/.env 2>/dev/null; echo "---DOCKER PS---"; docker ps --format '{{.Names}}\\t{{.Image}}\\t{{.Ports}}' 2>/dev/null | head -40)

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('keys:', list\(d.keys\(\)\)\); print\('json:', json.dumps\(d.get\('description_json'\)\)[:200]\); import base64; b=d.get\('description_binary'\); print\('binary len bytes:', len\(base64.b64decode\(b\)\)\)")
